title: Simple Plugin Hider
description: A plugin made to hide your plugins list from prying eyes.
body:
![banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2f8a4e3e9348d02e168e4728b1a56d25b69864c9.png)


### Features:

- Stops players without the necessary permission (sph.bypass) from viewing your plugins list.
- Allows you to use a custom command blocked message.
- Really, really simple!

### Commands/Permissions

Commands:

`None`

Permissions:

`sph.bypass` - Allows you to use the blocked commands
